evals.prompt: audit the architecture of this project — check if the structure follows good patterns
evals.expected_output: A structured audit report detecting project type (Expo+Convex), listing features found, checking screen thickness, import boundaries, and feature-route alignment.

assertions.text: Correctly identifies project as Expo React Native
Identifies Convex as the backend layer
Mentions features/demo/ as existing feature domain

evals.prompt: I want to add a pack-members feature. Users belong to packs and I need to list members, view a member profile, and invite new members. Guide me through building this.
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide for full vertical slice: Convex schema → helpers → API → hooks → components → screens.

assertions.text: Includes Convex schema with defineTable and validators

evals.prompt: Review screen code with multiple architecture violations
evals.expected_output: Code review catching boundary violations, business logic in screen, fat screen, and inline styles.

assertions.text: Identifies useQuery/api.* in screen as boundary violation
Identifies filter/sort as misplaced business logic
Shows refactored code with proper separation
